manifest.concept_text: In a dense, misty forest, copper-red haired HELEN (blue-grey eyes, freckles) notices a rustling sound, captured in a close-up with 35mm grain. Her expression shifts from curiosity to alarm as the shadow reveals itself, then she walks away silently, creating a continuous narrative sequence. The mood remains tense and atmospheric throughout.
